jdeatina:authenticate.jdeatina:input-parameters: #[output application/java --- { "JDE User": payload.user as String default "", "JDE Password": payload.password as String default "", "JDE Environment": payload.environment as String default p('config.jdeEnvironment'), "JDE Role": payload.role as String default p('config.jdeRole'), "Session Id": 0, "Transaction ID": 0, "JDE WS Connection": false }]

jdeatina:invoke-ws.doc:name: Invoke ws getPurchaseOrdersForApprover

jdeatina:authenticate.jdeatina:input-parameters: #[output application/java --- { "JDE Token": attributes.headers."X-Approver-Token" as String default "", "Transaction ID": 0, "JDE WS Connection": false }]

jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.doc:name: Invoke BSFN Credit Check Processing
jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.jdeatina:input-parameters: #[output application/json --- { mnCustomerNumber: vars.parameters.customerNumber as Number, szCompany: p('po.szCompany'), szCurrencyCodeTo: p('po.szCurrencyCodeTo'), cCreditCheckMode: '1' }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var jdeValues = vars.customerInfo --- { customerNumber: jdeValues.mnCustomerNumber, company: jdeValues.szCompany, currencyCode: jdeValues.szCurrencyCodeTo, creditLimitAmount: jdeValues.mnAmountCreditLimit, totalExposureAmount: jdeValues.mnAmountTotalExposure }
